titleStmt.title: SII 4.1339C: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1339-C. (A.R. No. 417-C of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakavarṣaṁbulu 1037 . svasti sarvvalōkāśraya śrīviṣṇuvarddhanamahārājula pravarddhamāna vijayarājyadi
vyasaṁvatsaraṁ 46 śrahi gaṁggagoṇḍacōḍavelanāṁṭi guddavādināṁṭi peddaḍākarēmi śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvaraku
vyatiyipātanimittamuna viddimakāṟumaḍapalanādaṇḍaina magadharāyani peṭṭina Akaṇḍavartti lōhada
ṇḍudiviya Okkaṇḍu dīniki nācaṁdrārkkāmu neyi sariyicuvārugā śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvara kilaramuna pedi
bōla nāvayayu bōtibōla navayayu bātabōla rājanayuṁ dalarāsi nāvayayu berasina bōlu nalvuru
buṁṭagā beddibōla nāvani yaḍapuna nāyamaṇḍummana vasamuna beṭṭina yinpaEḍlu Eṁbhadi nityapaḍi
gola(gola)vaṁgala tribhuvanāṁkusa nē māna 1
likitamu pedanasari .The following fragmentary inscription is found in continuation of this record:—
svasti . śrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu 12-
11 gunēṁṭi virōdisaṁvatsara vai-
śākha śu 15 śu svastiśrīmaddākṣārāma
śrībhīmēśvara śrīmahādēvaraku ru-
drinaIni koḍuku sauravararyaṁba-
ni nārayareḍiṁgāru pāḍakolli na-
gāriki puṇyamugānurudri-
ḍi muttumu vrittiṁ
Digital edition of SII 4.1339C by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
